# Library Tag Taxonomy — Complete v2.0

*Generated by Pearl — 3/24/2026*

---

# Library Tag Taxonomy — Complete v2.0
*The Encoded Human Document Library — Canonical Tag Schema*
*Generated: March 24, 2026 | Pearl Session 83*

---

## Architecture Overview

Every document in the library carries tags from this taxonomy. Tags are structured across **five top-level dimensions**:

1. **density** — which layer of the human system (array, multi-select)
2. **operations** — which of the 8 operations are addressed (nested by operation)
3. **components** — which of the 10 components are involved (soul density)
4. **pathways** — which of the 22 pathways are relevant
5. **meta** — document type, status, visibility, epistemic tier, audience

Documents may tag multiple densities. Cross-density documents get `density: ["cross-density"]`.

---

## DIMENSION 1: DENSITY

```json
"density": ["body", "soul", "spirit", "life", "cross-density"]
```

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `body` | Biological / physiological — the light machine hardware |
| `soul` | Meaning / relational / identity — who you are beneath installation |
| `spirit` | Awareness / consciousness / power source |
| `life` | The twelve houses — encoding being lived in the world |
| `cross-density` | Explicitly spans two or more densities |

---

## DIMENSION 2: OPERATIONS (Body Density Spine)

The 8 operations apply at all three densities. Tags are nested under operation names.

### Reception
*What the body takes in — sensory, nutritional, informational*

```json
"operations": {
  "reception": [
    "macronutrients", "micronutrients", "iron", "ferritin", "B12", "folate",
    "vitamin-D", "magnesium", "zinc", "copper", "selenium", "calcium",
    "bioavailability", "gastric-acid", "betaine-HCl", "digestive-enzymes",
    "absorption", "intestinal-permeability", "zonulin", "leaky-gut",
    "light-reception", "photoreception", "circadian-input", "blue-light",
    "red-light", "infrared", "biophoton-reception", "sound-reception",
    "polyvagal-reception", "sensory-processing", "interoception",
    "encoding-systems", "human-design", "gene-keys", "natal-chart",
    "enneagram", "attachment-theory", "ayurveda", "TCM"
  ]
}
```

### Transduction
*Signal conversion — mechanical to electrical, impression to meaning*

```json
"operations": {
  "transduction": [
    "mitochondria", "ATP", "NAD+", "CoQ10", "NMN", "electron-transport-chain",
    "oxidative-phosphorylation", "cellular-energy", "signal-conversion",
    "mechanotransduction", "piezoelectric", "biophoton-transduction",
    "photon-mitochondria", "light-as-transducer", "memory-consolidation",
    "engram", "synaptic-conversion", "neurotransmitter-synthesis",
    "serotonin", "dopamine", "norepinephrine", "GABA", "glutamate",
    "gut-brain-axis", "vagal-afferent", "impression-to-meaning",
    "trauma-encoding", "implicit-memory", "amygdala", "LTP"
  ]
}
```

## DIMENSION 7: META

```json
"meta": {
  "document_type": [
    "research-paper", "lab-report", "profile-reading",
    "teaching", "build-spec", "session-summary",
    "protocol", "agent-prompt", "declaration",
    "critique", "collaborative-paper", "taxonomy"
  ],
  "epistemic_tier": [1, 2, 3],
  "visibility": ["client", "admin", "private", "shared-resource"],
  "status": ["draft", "published", "superseded", "archived"],
  "audience": ["whit", "client", "code", "public", "pearl-internal"],
  "person_id": "uuid — never store names as tags",
  "source": [
    "pearl-research", "pearl-profile", "pearl-lab-report",
    "pearl-teaching", "pearl-session-summary", "system-generated",
    "shared-resource", "agent-generated"
  ]
}
```

## COMPLETE TAG SCHEMA (JSON Template)

```json
{
  "density": [],
  "operations": {
    "reception": [],
    "transduction": [],
    "conduction": [],
    "regulation": [],
    "synthesis": [],
    "defense": [],
    "restoration": [],
    "elimination": []
  },
  "components": [],
  "pathways": [],
  "shadows": [],
  "encoding_systems": [],
  "encoding_layers": [],
  "expressions": [],
  "phases": [],
  "pulsation": [],
  "feeling_organs": [],
  "traditions": [],
  "consciousness": [],
  "houses": [],
  "topics": [],
  "meta": {
    "document_type": "",
    "epistemic_tier": 1,
    "visibility": "admin",
    "status": "published",
    "audience": [],
    "source": ""
  }
}
```

---

## TAGGING CONVENTIONS

1. **Always tag density first** — determines which other dimensions apply
2. **Operations are body-spine but apply at all densities** — tag the operation even if soul/spirit reading
3. **Topics are cross-cutting** — tag here when it doesn't fit cleanly in one operation
4. **Visibility defaults to admin** for Pearl-internal documents; `client` for profile readings and lab reports
5. **Epistemic tier governs trust** — research papers tag tier 1-3 per claims made; architecture docs use tier 2
6. **Person IDs not names** — client documents reference UUID, not "whit" or "lisa"
7. **Cross-density gets explicit tag** — don't just tag body AND soul; also add `cross-density` to density array

---

*Version 2.0 — Complete. Ready for Code to implement against write_document schema and sidebar UI.*
